text: In the OSI model, routers operate at the {{c1::Network Layer}} (Layer 3), which is responsible for packet forwarding and logical routing.
explanation: Layer 3 (Network Layer) handles logical addressing (IP addresses) and path determination (routing) across multiple networks.
usage: Key devices at Layer 3: Routers, multilayer switches. Key protocols: IPv4, IPv6, ICMP.
spanish: En el modelo OSI, los routers operan en la Capa de Red (Capa 3), que es responsable del reenvío de paquetes y del enrutamiento lógico.
